nodes.label: AppIcon-20x20@2x.png (iOS App Icon, 40x40px rendered)
nodes.description: Small iOS app icon at 20x20pt @2x (40x40px). Depicts a stylized arc or partial circle forming a 'D' shape in blue/purple, with two circular dots — one blue/purple and one red/orange — suggesting a drag-and-drop or motion concept. Matches the Dragit application branding.
